meta.name: Product News Digest
meta.description: Compile a weekly digest of product announcements, launches, and updates from across the product industry. Curated for product managers and founders.

parameters.content:
## 49 — Product News Digest

Weekly curated digest of product management and SaaS news.

**Required:**
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO
- Optionally configure PRODUCT_RSS_URL_1/_2/_3 with your preferred feeds

**Default feeds:** Product Hunt, Mind The Product, TechCrunch
**Schedule:** Every Monday at 07:30
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Curate a weekly product news digest for a product manager at a SaaS startup. Select the 5-7 most relevant stories. Add a one-line insight for each. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 📦 Product News {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.week_headline || ($json.stories||[]).length + ' curated stories' }}
